zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave於1238年12月24日出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福時，他的父親Gilbert de Segrave27歲，母親Amabilia Chaucombe29歲。他於1256年與Matilda de Lucy在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾巴頓 澤亞格拉福結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1264年登記服兵役。他於1295年被列為member of parliament。他去世於1295年11月12日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾查阿可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave于1238年12月24日出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福时，他的父亲Gilbert de Segrave27岁，母亲Amabilia Chaucombe29岁。他于1256年与Matilda de Lucy在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾巴頓 澤亞格拉福结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1264年登记服兵役。他于1295年被列为member of parliament。他去世于1295年11月12日在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾查阿可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Segrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Seagrave
meanings: English: habitational name from Seagrave (Leicestershire), probably from Old English sēath ‘pit, hole’ + grāf ‘grove’.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave was born on 24 December 1238, in Seagrave, Leicestershire, England, his father, Gilbert de Segrave, was 27 and his mother, Amabilia Chaucombe, was 29. He married Matilda de Lucy in 1256, in Barton Seagrave, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1264. In 1295, at the age of 56, his occupation is listed as member of parliament. He died on 12 November 1295, in Seagrave, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Chacombe, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave est né le 24 décembre 1238, à Seagrave, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert de Segrave, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Amabilia Chaucombe, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Matilda de Lucy en 1256, à Barton Seagrave, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1264. En 1295, à l’âge de 56 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament. Il est décédé le 12 novembre 1295, à Seagrave, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Chacombe, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave am 24. Dezember 1238 in Seagrave, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert de Segrave 27 und seine Mutter Amabilia Chaucombe 29. Er hat 1256 in Barton Seagrave, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Matilda de Lucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1264 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1295, als er 56 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. November 1295 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Seagrave, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Chacombe, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave è nato il il 24 dicembre 1238 nel Seagrave, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Gilbert de Segrave, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Amabilia Chaucombe, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Matilda de Lucy nel 1256, nel Barton Seagrave, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1264. Nel 1295, all'età di 56 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament. Morì il 12 novembre 1295, nel Seagrave, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Chacombe, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segraveが1238年12月24日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアセアグラブで生まれた時，父Gilbert de Segraveは27歳，母Amabilia Chaucombeは29歳であった。1256年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバートン セアグラブでMatilda de Lucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1264年に兵役登録をした。1295年，56歳の時，職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1295年11月12日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアセアグラブで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアチャコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.Rockingham Castle, Ashby, Leicestershire: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애쉬비 데 라 즈우치
ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave(이)가 1238년 12월 24일 영국 레이스스터실르 시그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert de Segrave(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Amabilia Chaucombe(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1256년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 바턴 시그레이브에서 Matilda de Lucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1264년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1295년, 56세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1295년 11월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 시그레이브에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 차코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave nasceu em 24 de dezembro de 1238, em Seagrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert de Segrave, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Amabilia Chaucombe, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda de Lucy em 1256, em Barton Seagrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1264. Em 1295, com 56 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament. Ele faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1295, em Seagrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Chacombe, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Rockingham Castle, Ashby, Leicestershire: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave родился 24 декабря 1238 г. в местности сиграв, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Gilbert de Segrave было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Amabilia Chaucombe, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda de Lucy в 1256 г. в местности бартон сиграв, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1264 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1295 году, в возрасте 56 лет, работал по профессии member of parliament. Он умер 12 ноября 1295 г. в местности сиграв, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности чакомб, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave nació el 24 de diciembre de 1238, en Seagrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gilbert de Segrave, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Amabilia Chaucombe, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Matilda de Lucy en 1256, en Barton Seagrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1264. En 1295, a la edad de 56 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament. Murió el 12 de noviembre de 1295, en Seagrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Chacombe, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
